name: Apple Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
2. Set aside.
3. In another bowl, mix the applesauce, sugar, and spices with the egg whites and vanilla until well combined.
4. Gradually add the milk to the mixture, stirring constantly.
5. Stir in the flour mixture just until combined.
6. Fold in the chopped apples and raisins.
7. Pour the batter into a sprayed 7x11-inch pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
